case_title: FANEUIL HALL MARKETPLACE, INC. VS. GEORGIOU RETAIL STORES

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT; NOTICE OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT ISSUED FILED BY PLAINTIFF FANEUIL HALL MARKETPLACE, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT GEORGIOU RETAIL STORES JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT GEORGIOU RETAIL STORES
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT ON SISTER-STATE JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FANEUIL HALL MARKETPLACE, INC.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1710.25 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FANEUIL HALL MARKETPLACE, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GEORGIOU RETAIL STORES $46,276.86 PRINCIPAL, $129.30 ATTORNEY FEES, $2,350.04 INTEREST, $206.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $48,962.20, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION
